reviews.title: Great replacement bands for the Fitbit Charge 5
reviews.text: These bands fit well on the Fitbit Charge 5, as a replacement for a damaged band or just to change up the look now and then.  They are easy to install and remove and they do give an entirely different look to the Charge 5. I have the Large size and they are the same length as the original band that came with the Fitbit.  The colors as presented in listing are accurate and, in fact, I liked the teal and purple even more when I saw them in person.  There's only one noticeable difference between these bands and the original band.  The original band is quite smooth while these bands have some friction to them when you run you fingers over them.  Neither texture is better than the other. They're just different. My original band is black and absent the difference in feel, there's no real distinction vs. the black band that I received in this six pack.

A POWERFUL FITNESS PARTNER — The enhanced Workout app gives you new ways to train and advanced metrics for more information about your workout performance. And Apple Watch comes with three months of Apple Fitness+ free.
STAY CONNECTED — Send a text, make a call, listen to music and podcasts, use Siri, or call for help with Emergency SOS. Apple Watch SE (GPS) works with your iPhone or Wi-Fi to keep you connected.

reviews.title: It's ok. But you can get a Fitbit style watch for less
reviews.text: I wear it near my pulse because I feel it gives you a more accurate reading. The sleep monitor sucks. It didn't start monitoring my sleep until I turned it around and put the sensors on my inner wrist

reviews.title: Sent back twice because the blood pressure measurement was inaccurate
reviews.text: I had some confidence in buying this at first.  It connected to app nicely and did well with sleep measurement when I tried that.  I also liked the face choices.  However, having a reasonably accurate blood pressure measurement as long as it is included as a feature was very important for me.  It always read about the same measurement of 140/86, but that was not accurate when compared to a cuff style.  It also read the same for my wife who is always different.  I returned one, got an easy replacement and had the same issue.  Returned for refund this time.  I did not check if waterproof, but that was also an important feature.

reviews.title: Outstanding value
reviews.text: I got this for my spouse who has an android phone.  He absolutely loves it!  He was so thrilled with it and how easy it was to set up and use that he gave me a list of the pros and cons. Pros: comfortable; stylish (never heard him use that word before lol); there's a watchface for all tastes and occasions; the features are intuitive and the charge lasts for 24+ hours.  The only cons he mentioned was that it did not give an approximate charge time and that he can't figure out how to add contacts. I've never seen him so enthusiastic about a fitness watch before and he previously disdained them. Based on his experience, I would highly recommend this one.

reviews.title: It works as a watch but most other functions are suspect
reviews.text:
This smart watch looks nice enough - someone could easily confuse it for an older Apple Watch - and its easy to make custom watch faces (I put a pic I took at an Iron Maiden show on mine). And it is jam packed with features - way more than some other watches in this price range.

Unfortunately, I have trouble trusting its more advanced features.

A number of times when taking my temperature the watch says I have hypothermia, measuring me between 87-95f. I am a 200lb man living in in Southern California and my wife won’t turn the thermostat down below 74 degrees. I don’t have hypothermia. If it can’t properly read my body temperature, there’s no way I can trust its accuracy with many of the other health features - blood oxygen, blood pressure, heart rate, etc

That step count seems pretty accurate but ONLY once I paired the watch with the Da Fit app. Before I paired the watch, it measure me taking like 350 steps while just sitting on my couch. Not sure why it would measure differently paired or unpaired but it did - significantly. I would not recommend this as a fitness tracker for someone without a smart phone (yes, there are still a few people without smart phones).

And the sleep tracker seems to at least get my sleep times accurate, though I am unsure how well it reads light/deep sleep as I don’t really trust the readings from it’s health sensors. I want to believe its doing a good job. I like the way the app presents the sleep timeline and information. But I just don’t know if its accurate because the watch thinks I have hypothermia.

As for the non-health related functions, they are pretty spotty too. I stopped receiving text notifications after a couple days and could not get them to start back up again without completely disconnecting the phone from the app and starting over again.

Pros:
- Looks like an old gen Apple Watch.
- Customizable face
- Lots of features
- Doesn’t technically *need* a smart phone for many features
- Step counter seems accurate when paired
- Great battery life for a smart watch. I wore it for 5 days without charging.
- Nice app

Cons:
- Highly inaccurate step counter when it is not paired
- Health features are unreliable
- Notifications are unreliable
- The speaker in the watch sounds terrible
- Vibration function is weak and easily missable in active situations
- Sometimes the watch doesn’t ‘wake’ from sleep as easily/instantly as it should. I find myself having to give it an extra shake to wake it almost every time.

reviews.title: Great affordable smartwatch
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:52a9c3b58a7816ac48b831c65b3aa6ca]] This is a great smartwatch at a reasonable price. It works really well, making and receiving calls, and all of the other features. It is lightweight and charges really fast. The battery life is really good too. You cannot beat the price. Great value and highly recommended.

reviews.title: Unboxing
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:53bca64d7f3459321ad803eb09c234eb]] Let's start off with what I liked. I liked that is not heavy and feels comfortable. I like the size of the overall screen of the watch. I liked that it is easy to connect to your android device. I do not like that after a free trial service of the texting and monitoring of all the apps, you have to purchase monitoring space or data. I don't like that you are limited to how many contacts you can store on the device. I do not like the overall "ability to text feature." I feel that the text input data can be improved. Down to what and how you reply via messages.

reviews.title: DO NOT BUY worked less than 60 days and no customer support.
reviews.text:
DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY. YOU WILL REGRET IT!!!!
UPDATE: Less than 60 days and the watched completely stopped working.
Being new to using a smart watch I didn't want to invest a fortune. Read lots of reviews and decided to give this one a try. It is perfect. It does everything I want it to do. It looks great. It is simple to set it up as you want. AND they provided exceptional customer service!

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: This watch has never worked and the instructions did not help.

reviews.title: There are TWO ways of rating this... Garbage or almost garbage.
reviews.text:
There are two ways of rating purchases... either an overall evaluation IRREGARDLESS of the price OR... CONSIDERING THE PRICE. Considering I paid $20 for it... not horrible. BUT here are the SERIOUS flaws so far:

-The Blood Pressure monitor is a COMPLETE JOKE. "Inaccurate" is NOT the word. I tried it on several friends and coworkers. Garbage!
-You are supposed to be able to make a gesture of bringing your wrist up to view the watch and then it is supposed to turn the screen on so that you can read it. ALMOST NEVER! No matter HOW I make the gesture the only thing that works is a PAINFUL twist/shake of my wrist and then it's not guaranteed. I just use the button instead which kind of defeats the purpose.
-BUT THEN, when sleeping.... EVERY DAMNED MOVEMENT I MAKE it turns on... and waking up my wife, because it is like having a flashlight shone in your face!!!!!!!!!!!

So... EVEN THOUGH this was only $20... SAVE YOUR MONEY FOR SOMETHING THAT ACTUALLY WORKS AND WORKS WELL.

reviews.title: Great Smart Watch!
reviews.text: It is a great dupe of Apple Watch.  I absolutely love it. The greatest attraction is the extended battery time (7 to 10 days). I also like various fitness track features such as step count, heart-beat, workout routine. I could check weather too. Another interesting feature is the multiple watch face options. However I struggled a bit figuring out how to change those watch faces. The watch faces can be changed easily using the APP. I found the questions and answers mentioned on the webpage pretty helpful when figuring out other elements.

reviews.title: Bad watch!
reviews.text: The mobile app works fine! But after five months the watch failed to take a charge!! Try a new charger and the watch still wouldn't take a charge! Now I have a Dead watch! A watch should last longer than five months!!!!!

reviews.text: Headline says it all. My first order, I was hoping it was just a rando, but exchanged, and every single one has the same problem.  Just sloppy construction -- enough out of spec that it might or might not work. I love the band. It's a crying shame it doesn't stay connected to the fitbit. Can't imagine how there could be even a single 5-star -- maybe the first batches were fabricated correctly.  Unfortunately there's nothing as nice or comfortable that I've been able to find for charge-5, so I may end up getting yet a 5th and 6th trial and frankensteining them with parts that do work to get something that works and something I like. I'll let you know

reviews.text:
I love this strap it is so pretty and such a value for the money. It looks like it cost way more. The little kit it came with to attach it to the Fitbit and to remove extra links was so handy and easy to use. It attached with no trouble at all.

The only issue I had with it was that the rose gold color is slightly off from the Fitbit, but when wearing it, it’s not next to it directly so you can’t really tell. It’s not enough to bother me or take a star off but it could be for some.

reviews.title: Surprised at the comfort and beauty of the band.
reviews.text:
I've only had it on for a few hours, but I love it. The colors, black, pink on the resin look so rich and shiny. And it's a comfortable fit. I did have to take out 2 tabs to get a snug fit. Taking out the tabs wasn't difficult after figuring out the way the tool that came with it. Can't say the instructions were the best, but I figured it out.
I always got the magnetic mesh band in rose gold, but it always discolored and no matter what i tried I couldn't get it cleaned.
This is why I tried a new band. A review prompt gave suggestions of different things to comment on. One of the suggestions was a mobile app. I have no idea what that had to do with the band. Maybe someone knows and can let me know.
UPDATE:
I've been wearing it 24 hours a day, except when showering or recharging the watch. NO discloration, no running of colors (bracelet) and it doesn't get dirty looking like the metalic bands. I'm going to buy another one, just in case something happens to this. So worth the money.

reviews.title: Poor Measurements - Support Cannot Help
reviews.text:
After charging for 30 minutes as instructed, I paired the smart watch with the app. This was easy, and the one reason I gave it 2 stars instead of 1. The other reason for 2 stars, the interface was easier to use than I expected.

But if the measurements are not accurate, ease of use doesn't matter.

I bought this smart watch to track my heart rate while exercising—mainly walking. After recent heart procedures, my doctor wants me to keep my pulse below a certain rate. Each time I measure, the pulse differs substantially from the pulse oximeter that always agrees with my doctor's office pulse oximeter, and heart monitor. It goes as high as 90 when the PO says 52. I took multiple measurements, including taking my own pulse. The closest measurements were 60 when the actual rate was 51 or 52.

Support is through a chat on the app. I did not wait long for support, however they did not try to help me. They insisted that the heart rate changes. That I had to let it sync with the app. Not once did they address the possibility that the smart watch might be reading the rate wrong. Told me to try again after I had already tried multiple times.

Focusing on anything but the issue I am reporting does not help me. Even suggesting I exercise and measure my heart rate. Telling me the human heart rate is constantly changing. Literally, answers like they were talking to a small child.

I had high hopes for this device. It disappointed on two levels - Heart Rate, Support. I cannot recommend. Look for a different smart watch if you need accurate heart rate measurements.

reviews.title: NOT AS DESCRIBED AT ALL
reviews.text: I carefully read all reviews before purchasing this smart watch but was so disappointed. It would not hold preferences & kept defaulting to kg & cm. Would not toggle from one thing to another on app. Had to go all the way out of app & go back in before it would toggle from steps to profile to anything else. Sometimes I'd get my cell to ring on my watch, never could answer it or text back from the watch. I'd rather pay the extra & get an apple watch that actually works. I can't tell you how many times I set the preferences & saved them only to find it defaulted right back the next day.  One of the sorriest watches I've ever owned & I kept it 2 weeks before returning it really trying to make it work.

reviews.title: Better than name brand. Long battery life!!
reviews.text: I will take this watch over a fit bit any day! In fact my husband bought me a fit bit and I returned it because thus watch is soooo much better. What I like most is the BATTERY LIFE IS AMAZING! I bought it weeks ago and have only charged it twice.

reviews.title: Never dies
reviews.text: This thing is great.  Does everything you would expect and the battery lasts FOREVER!!  Great smartwatch.

reviews.title: Sleep function is worthless
reviews.text: I really like this watch, has everything I wanted and everything works with one exception:  the sleep analysis feature is worthless.  It only records sleep between 10:00 pm and 8:00 am and if you move or get up it screws up everything. Good customer service, they really try to help, but they will tell you if you get up to go to the bathroom, watch begins recording all over again. Too bad!

reviews.title: Excellent Dive Computer and Smart Watch
reviews.text:
I have been wearing this for a solid 4 months, using it to track dives, swimming, running, walking, treadmill workouts, etc. In watch mode the battery lasts a long time, but for activities you will find yourself charging it after about 5-8 hours of activity use.

I was a bit worried my skin would react as I cannot usually wear anything metal unless high quality gold or sterling silver. No problems with this watch - the band is comfortable and the watch, while a bit larger than I was used to, fits well and without any reaction.

Functions while diving were flawless. You have a lot of parameter's you can set - this thing is designed for divers. It tracks entry and exit locations accurately. I wish I could tell it when my dive is starting and when done, the automatic feature is a bit annoying in this regard. However, it is one less thing to remember when you are in the water and doing a buddy check to get going. It is pretty neat to how nicely it updates the app on your phone and makes sharing easy.

Pool swimming is not entirely accurate - the watch cannot record kickboard laps, for example, so if you like to vary your workout you won't have accurate times or distances. Basically, any time you are not completing actual strokes you won't get a record.

Treadmill work - you can adjust the settings to match your treadmill readings. I found it was not very accurate and finally quit bothering to adjust it. The watch was either lower in distance or higher every time, but close enough to just let it be. At least once you leave it alone you get consistent numbers, and you can also record numbers from the treadmill if you want.

Walking and trail running features are great - I love seeing where I was with the GPS integration. I work out regularly on a measured trail and the distances are spot-on with the MK2S. There are workouts it will suggest, but I tend to stick to my own and ignore those. I was really frustrated to find my VO2 was consistently "Poor" all fall, but have seen some improvement recently with regular workouts. Kind of cool getting readings like that.

I plan to use this watch for backpacking as well - I have not had an opportunity to test it since the purchase, but my last trip my sister had a different model and it worked well other than eating power. You absolutely have to carry one or two good battery packs to charge it. I really wish this had a solar option, which I understand is in future plans, so I will more than likely upgrade when that is offered. Even so, hiking puts your wrist in the shade a lot of the time unless you are hiking alpine locations, so not sure how well solar would actually work.

All said, I love my "toy". It helps keep me motivated when I see I have been in the office too long or my scores are a lot lower. I am competitive and happy to compete against myself, so it works well. I don't use the connections, although I have considered seeing if anyone I know has a Garmin, but so far its all me :D While pricy, for someone who loves a wide variety of athletic activity, you can't beat the Garmin Mk2 in any of its versions. My husband is still trying to decide if he wants the Mk2S or the Mk2i but he will be getting one or the other. Fantastic product.

title: Fintie Band Compatible with Fitbit Versa 2 / Versa/Versa Lite, Premium Resin Replacement Wristband Strap Bracelet Compatible with Fitbit Versa Smart Watch, Pink-tone
description:
Fintie, a quality product within your reach!
Tech Specs:
1. Material: High quality Resin with metal buckle2.Color: Pink-tone, Tortoise-tone, Purple. Various colors available to dress up your Fitbit Versa and match any suit in your wardrobe
Compatible with
Versa 2, Versa 2 Special Edition, Versa Special Edition, Versa and Versa Lite Edition watches.
What's in the Box:
1 x Sport Loop Band for Fitbit Versa; 3 x Quick Release Spring Pins (the Fitness Tracker is NOT included)
features: Buckle closure
Perfect accessory band Compatible with Versa 2, Versa 2 Special Edition, Versa Special Edition, Versa and Versa Lite Edition watches. (The Fitbit device is not included.)

Combined with premium Resin and stainless steel metal buckle, this strap stands as a symbol of luxury, nobility, elegance and durability, feels like plastic lightweight design, but more durable and comfortable than plastic.
Adjustable Length: The size can be adjusted according to the circumstance of individual wrist, fits 6.65"-8.15" (169mm-207mm) wrist.
Durable Buckle: Refined double button folding clasp design, firmly closed, and prevent loosen automatically, safe and beautiful.

Quick Release Design: Easy to replace or exchange the strap band without tools within seconds. Package Contents: 1 x Smart Watch Band, 3 x Quick Release Spring Bars, 1 x Link Removal Tool and 1 x User manual. (Note: watch is Not included.)

reviews.title: These where exactly what I needed
reviews.text: Great band. I ended up getting two different colors. Easy to switch out and extremely cute.

title: WONMILLE Posh Leather Bands Compatible with Fitbit Charge 5 Bands for Women, Handmade Multilayer Wrap Bracelets Jewelry Strap Wristband Replacement for Fitbit Charge 5 Fitness Tracker
description:
Transform your charge 5 fitness tracker with our vintage band accessories, posh leather wrap design make it very unique in daily leisure or work wearing, and suitable for Dressing up, Party, Sport and other Leisure.
Compatible Models:
Fitbit Charge 5. - Not compatible with any other models.
Fits Wrist Size:
5.3 - 7.5 inch(135 - 190 mm)
Best Gift:
Suit for daily use, working, dinner party, travel, formal, casual occasions. A wonderful gift for the person you love, your family and friends during wedding, party, holiday, birthday, anniversary, Mother's Day, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas, New year, etc.
Package Includes:
1 x replacement wristband (NO watch included)
features: Compatible Models: This WONMILLE Top Grain Leather Bands Only Compatible with Fitbit Charge 5 Fitness Tracker Watch Bands.
Superior Materials: Posh leather band, won't pilling or peeling off, with high quality solid stainless steel links for easy resizing. More stylish and attractive than standard versa bands.

Easy to Resize: Suitable for 5.3-7.5 inch wrists. Three folding clasp type links allow rapid and secure resizing without the need for tools. Simply remove a folding clasp to resize the band, no tools needed!

Unique Design: Vintage elegance is at hand with this design to compliment most wrist. This Watch band is perfect for matching with jewelry or clothing. Charge 5 band will give your look an edge with its perfect fusion of leather and stainless steel.

Perfect gift: Available in multiple colors, this multilayer leather bracelet is excellent gift idea. Delight mom on Mother's Day, your girlfriend for Valentine's Day, your daughter for Christmas or best friend on her birthday.
Patents Item: Original design, we have applied this design patent, please do not copy.

reviews.title: Pretty but...
reviews.text: I've had this for less than 2 weeks and the brackets around the black straps have patinaed and the black covering on the "leather" straps have started to sluff off. Not impressed

reviews.title: Love this Fitbit band!
reviews.text: This band really dressed my Fitbit up and is comfortable to wear. I purchased it in black as well. I like that you can easily take out links to make the band smaller as I have a very small wrist. Great price too!

reviews.title: Picture is better
reviews.text: Band is large. Clip comes undone. You have to be very careful when wearing.

title: OUTAD Smart Watch for Android/iOS Phones, Bluetooth Health Tracker with Fitness Tracker Monitor Blood Oxygen Meter Heart Rate Monitor, Digital Smartwatch for Women Men, 3ATM Waterproof
features: 【HEALTH TRACKING 】24*7 tracking your heart rate, Blood Oxygen, Sleep stage, Stress status, to let you know your physical conditions better. Easy to check your steps, calorie or distance with 1.3in touch screen. The data you want to know is in your wrist.

【15 EXERCISE MODES】 SN88 Smart Watch supports 15 exercise modes to record workouts like Running, cycling, walking, free training, elliptical machine, climbing, skipping rope, weightlifting, yoga, basketball, football, tennis, badminton, table tennis and so on. More sports, more different record way.

【CALL & APP NOTIFICATIONS】 Get a call, preview message and App notifications after smart watch is connected with your phone. Receive and read SMS messages and SNS notifications straight to your device (including Facebook, twitter, WhatsApp, LinkedIn and Instagram).

【COMPATIBILITY】 Compatible with iOS (9.0 above) and Android (5.0 above) smartphones. App enables to connect with the health App and Google Fit. SN88 Watch comes with a magnetic charging USB cable. Charge for two hours, use for half a month. The watch band length is 10in.

【More Practical Features】 Support breath guide, vibration alarm clocks.It can also be your stopwatch , timer, shutter and music controller. More function waiting you to explore.You can also adjust the screen brightness and DIY the watch faces to meet your operating environment. This watch can be a very good gift choice to make people live more healthy, more active and more convenient.

reviews.title: Waste of Money
reviews.text: Worked for less than a month. No option to return. Don't buy!!!!
